GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [revenue@2 DESC]
  GpuSortExec: expr=[revenue@2 DESC], fetch=20
    GpuProjectExec: expr=[c_custkey@0 as c_custkey, c_name@1 as c_name, sum(lineitem.l_extendedprice * Int64(1) - lineitem.l_discount)@7 as revenue, c_acctbal@2 as c_acctbal, n_name@4 as n_name, c_address@5 as c_address, c_phone@3 as c_phone, c_comment@6 as c_comment]
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[c_custkey, c_name, c_acctbal, c_phone, n_name, c_address, c_comment], aggr=[sum(lineitem.l_extendedprice * Int64(1) - lineitem.l_discount)]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=4880644
          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([c_custkey@0, c_name@1, c_acctbal@2, c_phone@3, n_name@4, c_address@5, c_comment@6], 8), input_partitions=8

              GpuProjectExec: expr=[c_custkey@1 as c_custkey, c_name@2 as c_name, c_address@3 as c_address, c_phone@4 as c_phone, c_acctbal@5 as c_acctbal, c_comment@6 as c_comment, l_extendedprice@7 as l_extendedprice, l_discount@8 as l_discount, n_name@0 as n_name]

                  GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(n_nationkey@0, c_nationkey@3)], projection=[1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10]

                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([n_nationkey@0], 8), input_partitions=1

                                  GpuFilterExec: predicate=l_returnflag@3 = R, projection=[0, 1, 2]
                                    GpuScanExec: batch_size=4880644
--- memory ---
total_estimate_cost=8496
